strengths: Experience building ELT pipelines with Airflow and BigQuery
Implemented data quality (Great Expectations) and CI/CD
weaknesses: No FastAPI or backend API framework usage listed
Limited or no Generative AI/LLM project exposure
RAG/Text-to-SQL and vector DB experience missing
improvement_bullets: Architected robust ELT pipelines using dbt and Dagster (or Airflow), organizing data into a Medallion Architecture (Bronze, Silver, Gold) to ensure high-fidelity data readiness for downstream AI/ML consumption.
Developed production-grade backend services using Python and FastAPI to create low-latency data access layers for GenAI applications and LLM-powered interfaces.
Engineered and deployed RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines and Text-to-SQL workflows, utilizing vector databases to enable contextual data retrieval for enterprise Generative AI agents.
Collaborated with ML teams to integrate LLM capabilities into enterprise data platforms, utilizing LangGraph for building autonomous AI agents that automate complex decision-making tasks.
Designed scalable data infrastructure on GCP, implementing robust data quality frameworks and API-driven data services to support high-performance Generative AI and analytics workloads.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with Jobs via Dice. I am interested in this opportunity because of Smartwork IT Services' focus on building cutting-edge, scalable data platforms that empower AI-driven decision-making. What interests me about working for Smartwork IT Services is its commitment to integrating advanced Generative AI into enterprise workflows, which aligns perfectly with my background in high-impact data engineering and Python development. I believe my expertise in building scalable ELT pipelines and my proficiency in Python-based API development would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my career at Haven Technologies, I approached data challenges by prioritizing clean, structured datasets to drive feature adoption. In fact, when tasked with improving data accuracy for front-end development, I utilized SQL and Python to synchronize REST API and relational data, resulting in a 60% increase in data reliability. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role at Jobs via Dice would allow me to bring my deep understanding of dbt and dimensional modeling to support complex AI and analytics workloads. Additionally, my role as an Analytics & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my orchestration and automation skills. For instance, I led the transition to automated reporting workflows using Python and data pipeline tools, which reduced manual efforts by 30% and improved operational efficiency by 40%. This experience in designing efficient, automated data flows is directly applicable to the pipeline architecture required for your GenAI applications. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and SQL in working on RAG pipelines and LLM integrations at Smartwork IT Services. I know that my expertise in data modeling and my ability to build robust API-driven services align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
